title: Piece of Your Heart
why_this_song: Piece of Your Heart by MEDUZA (2019) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Uh, da, da, da, uh, uh
Show me a piece of you (down, down, down)
Show me a part of you (down, down, down)
I'll be what you want (down, down, down)

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "show" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "show" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "piece" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "piece" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: The way that we touch is never enough

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Piece of Your Heart" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Piece of Your Heart" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Piece of Your Heart" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Piece of Your Heart" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Piece of Your Heart" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Piece of Your Heart"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Piece of Your Heart", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Piece of Your Heart", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: "Piece of Your Heart" was released in 2019. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Piece of Your Heart" foi lançada em 2019. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.
